<!-- Thanks for contributing to AICortex! Keep this short and concrete. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How it was tested

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, or new tests. AICortex prefers small, fail-open,
     data-as-config changes — describe how you verified nothing regresses. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, real hostnames/IPs, or other private data in the diff
- [ ] New capabilities are added **as data** where possible (skill / service config), not hard-coded
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] Security-relevant changes keep the secure-by-default posture (auth, vault, SSRF guard, TLS)
- [ ] Linked the related issue (e.g. `Closes #123`)
